::: {.aside .meta-note}
**META (v2):** Gallery lead. Located vs distributional in one line, plus the Post-2 nod that the walk is top-down and slightly reordered from the site.
:::

One distinction to carry in. Most worldviews are located, picking a branch and saying the danger is here. A few are distributional: they do not pick a branch so much as bet that the dangerous ones are nearly empty, and they attach to the branch they most deny. We walk the tree top-down, in a slightly different order from the website.
